description: Run the Mass Properties analysis on the provided UAV model (/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/tactical_uav.vsp3) to find the true longitudinal Center of Gravity (X_cg). OpenVSP will automatically save a tactical_uav_MassProps.txt file when you compute. Then add a new Pod component named 'LaunchHook' (Length: 0.15 m, Max Diameter: 0.05 m). Position its XLocation exactly at the computed X_cg, YLocation at 0.0, and ZLocation at -0.3. Save the updated model to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/uav_launch_ready.vsp3.
